name: heatmap.js
when_to_use: 有一堆带强度的 (x,y) 像素点、想看『哪里热』(点击、眼动、人流、信号强度)且底图是任意图片/平面时用它,而非手写渐变;日历格热力用 cal-heatmap,地理大规模用 deck.gl HeatmapLayer。augment 边界:它只在你给的 container 内建一张 canvas 热力层,底图/定位/坐标换算由消费 AI 自己排。
why_valuable: AI 徒手写高斯核密度叠加 + 渐变着色 + 性能几乎不可能跑对;heatmap.js 用 radius/blur/gradient 固定核密度渲染,setData 直接吃 {x,y,value} 点,零依赖、不注入任何全局样式或监听。

en.when_to_use: Use it when you have intensity-weighted (x,y) pixel points and want to see where activity is concentrated (clicks, eye tracking, foot traffic, or signal strength) over any image or plane instead of hand-writing gradients; use cal-heatmap for calendar-cell heatmaps and deck.gl HeatmapLayer for large geographic data. Augmentation boundary: it creates only a canvas heat layer inside the supplied container; the consuming AI owns the basemap, positioning, and coordinate conversion.
en.why_valuable: AI is extremely unlikely to hand-write Gaussian kernel-density accumulation, gradient coloring, and performance correctly; heatmap.js fixes kernel-density rendering through radius/blur/gradient, and setData directly consumes {x,y,value} points with no dependencies, global style injection, or global listeners.

data_in.note: x/y are integer pixel coordinates relative to the container's top-left corner; value is intensity. max/min control color-band normalization; when max is omitted, the consuming AI must take the peak points.value.

points.x: number -- pixel X inside the container (integer)
points.y: number -- pixel Y inside the container (integer)

schema.max: number -- setData intensity upper bound (for color-band normalization); the consuming AI must use the peak points.value by default

config?.radius?: number -- Gaussian kernel radius in px, default 40

spec.note: The container needs explicit px width and height (offsetWidth/Height are read synchronously during create); do not use vh or percentage heights. The rendered canvas fills the container.

license: MIT (源码头声明 dual MIT/Beerware;npm package.json 缺 license 字段)

data_in.note: x/y 是相对 container 左上角的像素坐标(整数);value 是强度。max/min 决定色带归一化,不给 max 须由消费 AI 取 points.value 峰值。

points.x: number —— 容器内像素 X(整数)
points.y: number —— 容器内像素 Y(整数)

schema.max: number —— setData 强度上界(色带归一化用);默认须由消费 AI 取 points.value 峰值

config?.radius?: number —— 高斯核半径 px,默认 40
config?.gradient?: { '<0..1 停靠点>': 'css 颜色' } —— 默认 蓝→绿→黄→红

spec.note: container 须显式 px 宽高(create 时同步读取 offsetWidth/Height),禁 vh/百分比高;渲染的 canvas 铺满 container。

example._why: 钉死 heatmap.js 的点字段 x/y/value 与像素坐标语义。

uplink: display/local-interact 默认不上行;getValueAt({x,y})/getDataURL() 等查询由消费 AI 直接接原生 API。

carriers.widget: supported:container 建在 shadowRoot,heatmap.js 只在 container 内建 canvas、零 CSS 注入、零全局监听;container 须先连接且有显式 px 尺寸
carriers.codex: supported:ESM + canvas2d,无 worker/wasm/uplink 硬依赖

isolation.evidence: build/heatmap.js@2.0.5(+esm default export = h337 对象,含 .create,已核 create:function)。grep build/heatmap.js:仅有的 DOM 操作是 createElement('canvas')(x4:主图 + 离屏/shadow 缓冲)与 container.appendChild(canvas)——零 document.head、零 document.body、零 window.addEventListener、零 createElement('style')。h337.create({container}) 把 canvas 严格建在传入的 container 内;setData({max,min,data:[{x,y,value}]}) 源码已核。shadowCompatible=yes:container 可在 shadowRoot(create 同步读 container.offsetWidth/Height,故 host 须已连接且有尺寸再 create)。license:源码头声明 dual MIT/Beerware,npm package.json 缺该字段。
